articles.title: TreeSize won't renew perpetual-license support unless users subscribe
articles.content: "Current economic conditions" have shifted TreeSize's business model.
articles.titleZh: 除非用户订阅，否则TreeSize不会续订永久许可证支持
articles.contentZh: “当前经济状况”改变了TreeSize的商业模式。

articles.title: HP fined 1.4 billion rupees for “cartelization” of ink cartridges, toner, PCs
articles.content: Resellers threatened to ditch HP printing supplies for counterfeits.
articles.titleZh: 惠普因墨盒、碳粉、个人电脑的“卡特尔化”被罚款14亿卢比
articles.contentZh: 经销商威胁要放弃惠普打印用品的假冒产品。

articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
articles.titleZh: 现在，即使是俄罗斯最精英的黑客也在使用Clickfix来感染设备
articles.contentZh: 社交工程技术主要是出于经济动机的犯罪分子的工具。

articles.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
articles.content: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.
articles.titleZh: 随着投资者寻找发挥人工智能热潮的方式，能源IPO激增
articles.contentZh: 本世纪进入市场的公司正在以最快的速度筹集资金。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
articles.content: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is just around the corner, and the company is expected to take the wraps off a bunch of new devices. Based on the rumors and leaks we've seen so far, Samsung's next generation of foldables will likely be the stars of the show. Samsung is expected to show off a […]
articles.titleZh: 三星Galaxy 2026年7月解包：如何观看
articles.contentZh: 三星的下一届Galaxy Unpacked活动即将到来，预计该公司将推出一系列新设备。根据我们迄今为止看到的谣言和泄露，三星的下一代可折叠式手机可能会成为该节目的明星。三星预计将展示[…]

articles.title: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over
articles.content: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia. The short comes from Blomkamp's new AI startup / production company, Barley Studios, and features characters whose voices and faces are modeled after human actors. But […]
articles.titleZh: 尼尔·布洛姆坎普（ Neill Blomkamp ）的新僵尸人工智能“电影”刚刚热身
articles.contentZh: 周一，第九区和《Gran Turismo》导演尼尔·布洛姆坎普（ Neill Blomkamp ）公布了他的最新项目：一部13分钟的科幻短片，名为《Nightborne》，松散地改编自彼得·瓦茨（ Peter Watts ） 2014年的小说《Echopraxia》。这部短片来自Blomkamp的新人工智能创业/制作公司Barley Studios ，其角色的声音和面孔模仿了人类演员。但是[…]
